title: Truthy
subtitle: Behaves like true
goal: Understand which values JavaScript treats as true in a Boolean context.
explanation: Truthy values are values that become true when converted to Boolean.
Most values in JavaScript are truthy.
In if statements, JavaScript automatically checks whether a value is truthy or falsy.
Understanding truthy values is very important when working with conditions.

analogy.title: Analogy
analogy.text: Imagine a checkpoint. Most values pass the check and receive true status.

mistake.title: Common mistake
mistake.text: Beginners often think that any unusual value becomes false. In fact, most values convert to true.
